name: refactor: Icon Sprite Adoption — replace inline SVG with <use> across all HTML sources

tasks.name: Setup Playwright infrastructure (install, config, test file, scripts)
tasks.acceptance: cd /Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối\ tuần\ đi\ đâu/weekend-go-web && test -f playwright.config.js && test -f tests/visual/pages.spec.js && grep -q '"test:visual"' package.json && npx playwright --version >/dev/null

tasks.name: Capture baseline visual snapshots (16 PNG) BEFORE any icon refactor
tasks.acceptance: cd /Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối\ tuần\ đi\ đâu/weekend-go-web && npm run build && npx playwright test --update-snapshots && test $(ls tests/visual/__snapshots__/pages.spec.js-snapshots/*.png 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -eq 16

tasks.name: Include <!-- @include partials/icons.svg --> in 4 src/*.src.html files (right after <body>)
tasks.acceptance: cd /Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối\ tuần\ đi\ đâu/weekend-go-web && test $(grep -l '<!-- @include partials/icons.svg -->' src/*.src.html | wc -l) -eq 4

tasks.name: Replace 3 inline <svg> (mail-fill, facebook, linkedin) in partials/footer.html with <use href>
tasks.acceptance: cd /Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối\ tuần\ đi\ đâu/weekend-go-web && test $(grep -cE '<use href="#icon-(mail-fill|facebook|linkedin)"' partials/footer.html) -eq 3 && test $(grep -c '<svg ' partials/footer.html) -eq 3

tasks.name: Replace nav-back <svg> in privacy/terms/community-standards with <use href="#icon-carousel-prev">
tasks.acceptance: cd /Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối\ tuần\ đi\ đâu/weekend-go-web && test $(grep -c 'href="#icon-carousel-prev"' src/privacy.src.html src/terms.src.html src/community-standards.src.html | awk -F: '{s+=$2}END{print s}') -eq 3 && test $(grep -c '"M15 19l-7-7 7-7"' src/privacy.src.html src/terms.src.html src/community-standards.src.html | awk -F: '{s+=$2}END{print s}') -eq 0

tasks.name: Replace ALL 36 inline <svg> in src/index.src.html with <use href> (hamburger, carousel controls, 15 stars, 5 FAQ chevrons, 2 App Store, 2 Google Play)
tasks.acceptance: cd /Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối\ tuần\ đi\ đâu/weekend-go-web && test $(grep -c 'href="#icon-star"' src/index.src.html) -eq 15 && test $(grep -c 'href="#icon-faq-chevron"' src/index.src.html) -eq 5 && test $(grep -c 'href="#icon-app-store"' src/index.src.html) -eq 2 && test $(grep -c 'href="#icon-google-play"' src/index.src.html) -eq 2 && test $(grep -c 'href="#icon-hamburger"' src/index.src.html) -eq 1 && test $(grep -cE 'href="#icon-carousel-(prev|next|pause|play)"' src/index.src.html) -eq 4 && test $(grep -c 'zm3.199-1.4l2.533 1.467' src/index.src.html) -eq 0 && test $(grep -c 'M9.049 2.927' src/index.src.html) -eq 0 && test $(grep -c 'class="carousel-toggle-pause' src/index.src.html) -eq 1 && test $(grep -c 'class="carousel-toggle-play' src/index.src.html) -eq 1

tasks.name: Build output + run full verification (markup grep + Playwright visual diff + approve GP snapshot update)
tasks.acceptance: cd /Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối\ tuần\ đi\ đâu/weekend-go-web && npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- assets/css/styles.css && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['index.html','privacy.html','terms.html','community-standards.html'];let bad=[];for(const f of files){const h=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const uses=(h.match(/href=\"#icon-[a-z-]+\"/g)||[]).map(u=>u.slice(7,-1));const ids=(h.match(/id=\"icon-[a-z-]+\"/g)||[]).map(i=>i.slice(4,-1));const idset=new Set(ids);for(const u of uses)if(!idset.has(u))bad.push(f+': #'+u);}if(bad.length){console.error('BROKEN:',bad);process.exit(1);}console.log('OK');" && npx playwright test
